nasb.text: Pray for us, for we are sure that we have a good conscience, desiring to conduct ourselves honorably in all things.

esv.text: Pray for us, for we are sure that we have a clear conscience, desiring to act honorably in all things.

cnv.text: 請為我們禱告，因為我們深信自己良心無虧，願意凡事遵行正道。

ccb.text: 请为我们祷告，因为我们自信良心无愧，凡事都愿意遵行正道。

csbs.text: 请为我们祷告；因为我们深信自己有无愧的良心，愿意在一切事上行事正直。
